recommendations.title: Dragon
recommendations.overview: A sinful martial arts expert wants to start a new tranquil life, only to be hunted by a determined detective and his former master.

recommendations.title: American Dreams in China
recommendations.overview: Three Chinese friends build a successful English language school to help Chinese teenagers fulfil their dreams.

recommendations.title: Schindler's List
recommendations.overview: The true story of how businessman Oskar Schindler saved over a thousand Jewish lives from the Nazis while they worked as slaves in his factory during World War II.

recommendations.title: The General

recommendations.title: Metamorphosis
recommendations.overview: An evil spirit that changes faces infiltrates one family placing one brother in danger while the other tries to save him.
China's first President Sun Yat-Sen and military commander Huang Xing lead the revolutionary Wuchang Uprising in a bid to put an end to the reign of the Qing Dynasty.
recommendations.director: Tao Hai, Jackie Chan, Zhang Li, Tang Guoqiang

recommendations.title: Kingdom
recommendations.overview: Set in Qin Dynasty during the warring states period in ancient China. Shin was a war orphan. He has a dream of becoming a great general Shin has a fateful encounter with young King Eisei. King Eisei aims to unify all of China.
